name: STATE-006 VComplex: Distributed Causal Ordering Violation

parameters.text:
You are Node A. Set value to 10, increment your clock.

Output: {"node": "A", "value": 10, "vector_clock": {"a": 1, "b": 0, "c": 0}, "operation": "set"}

You are Node B. Receive A's update (value=10) but your message to C is delayed.

Output: {"node": "B", "value": 10, "vector_clock": {"a": 1, "b": 1, "c": 0}, "received_from": "A", "pending_to": "C"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "workflow.completed",
  "workflow_name": "STATE-006 VComplex: Distributed Causal Ordering Violation",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.session_id }}",
  "failure_mode": "STATE-006",
  "complexity": "very_complex",
  "expected_detection": "race_condition",
  "state_tracking": {
    "initial_state": {{ $('Initialize').item.json.distributed_state }},
    "node_a_update": "{{ $('Node A Update').item.json.output }}",
    "node_b_receive": "{{ $('Node B Receive').item.json.output }}",
    "node_c_stale": "{{ $('Node C Stale Update').item.json.output }}",
    "consistency_report": "{{ $('Consistency Checker').item.json.output }}",
    "distributed_system": true,
    "vector_clock_analysis": true,
    "network_partition_simulation": true
  },
  "agents": [
    {"agent_id": "node_a", "role": "distributed_node", "outputs": ["{{ $('Node A Update').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "node_b", "role": "distributed_node", "outputs": ["{{ $('Node B Receive').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "node_c", "role": "distributed_node", "outputs": ["{{ $('Node C Stale Update').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "checker", "role": "consistency_checker", "outputs": ["{{ $('Consistency Checker').item.json.output }}"]}
  ]
}

meta.description: Distributed nodes with network delay cause causal ordering violation
meta.expected_detection: Vector clock analysis detects causal ordering violation in distributed state
